name: io.github.getanirao/ghidra-bizhawk-mcp
description: Unified Ghidra + BizHawk MCP server for static analysis, P-code emulation, multi-console ROM triage, and live emulation.
author: getanirao

environmentVariables.name: GHIDRA_INSTALL_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Ghidra installation directory

environmentVariables.name: MOCK_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for zero-dependency CI simulation
